# cryptorandomstring [![Build Status](https://travis-ci.org/yoginth/cryptorandomstring.svg?branch=master)](https://travis-ci.org/yoginth/cryptorandomstring)

> Generate a [cryptographically strong](https://en.m.wikipedia.org/wiki/Strong_cryptography) random string

Can be useful for creating an identifier, slug, salt, fixture, etc.


## Install

```
$ npm install --save cryptorandomstring
```


## Usage

```js
const cryptoRandomString = require('crypto-random-string');

cryptoRandomString(10);
//=> '2cf05d94db'
```


## API

### cryptoRandomString(length)

#### length

Type: `number`

Length of the returned string.
